title: actor_cache.rs: O(n) eviction scan on every insert at MAX_ENTRIES
description: When len >= MAX_ENTRIES (10000), the eviction path iterates the entire HashMap to find the single oldest entry by fetched_at, then removes it and inserts the new entry. Under sustained load at the 10000-entry cap, every cache miss pays an O(10000) linear scan. Fix: switch to an LRU eviction structure (e.g. lru crate, or a BTreeMap<Instant, String> as an eviction index), or evict a batch (e.g. oldest 100) to amortize the cost.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
